overview: SmartLearn Quest is a commercial-grade educational gaming ecosystem built for schools in Ghana and beyond. Students travel through cinematic Knowledge Worlds — ICT, Mathematics, Science, English, Robotics, and Critical Thinking — earning XP, coins, and achievements as they master curriculum objectives through real gameplay. The platform features 5 fully playable ICT flagship games, a complete progression system, and role-based dashboards for students, teachers, parents, and admins.
features: Cinematic world map with unlockable Knowledge Worlds for ICT, Math, Science, English, Robotics, and Critical Thinking
5 fully playable ICT games: Mouse Master, Keyboard Ninja, Typing Speed Tournament, Cyber Safety Defense, and Coding Basics Puzzle Arena
Complete progression system with XP, coins, level badges, achievements, and streak tracking
Internet Identity login with role-based access for students, teachers, parents, and admins
Student dashboard with real-time stats, hub progress rings, and achievement grid
Ghana Education Service curriculum alignment (Basic 1-9 grade levels)
Dark futuristic AAA-style UI with glassmorphism, neon accents, and smooth Framer Motion transitions
Navigable stubs for all subject worlds and role dashboards — ready for expansion
